import React from 'react'; import { Home, Bot, Cloud, Sprout, ShoppingBag, Building2, Newspaper, Map, FileBarChart, CheckSquare, Wallet, FolderOpen, Package, MessageSquareWarning, Calendar, User, Settings, Headphones, Globe, Leaf, LogOut } from 'lucide-react'; import './Sidebar.css'; const navItems = [ { icon: Home, label:'Dashboard' }, { icon: Bot, label:'AI Assistant' }, { icon: Cloud, label:'Weather' }, { icon: Sprout, label:'Crop Advisor' }, { icon: ShoppingBag, label:'Market Prices' }, { icon: Building2, label:'Government Schemes' }, { icon: Newspaper, label:'News' }, { icon: Map, label:'Maps' }, { icon: FileBarChart, label:'Reports' }, { icon: CheckSquare, label:'Tasks' }, { icon: Wallet, label:'Finance' }, { icon: FolderOpen, label:'Farm Records' }, { icon: Package, label:'Inventory' }, { icon: MessageSquareWarning, label:'Complaints' }, { icon: Calendar, label:'Calendar' }, { icon: User, label:'Profile' }, { icon: Settings, label:'Settings' } ]; export default function Sidebar({ activePage, setActivePage, sidebarOpen }){ function handleLogout(){ alert('Logged Out'); } return(
Farmer Support Portal Digital Agriculture
{navItems.map(({icon:Icon,label})=>( ))}
